sources.title: Big Trouble In Seattle | Full Movie | Award Winning Crime Thriller
sources.description:
A gangster is going through court trial for murder. Before they have enough evidence to convict him, his trusted lawyer schemes a plan to frame a young woman for the crime.
2021.  Stars: Giovanni Accettola, Leslie Asplund, Luis Alexander Barriga
